response.justification: Despite strong full-stack and geospatial experience via GISCollective, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing/navigation pipelines, has no demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time traffic integration, and their recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent tooling — not the low-latency, systems-level geospatial data processing required.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO use
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and languages
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of commercial C++ or Rust development in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks demonstrated experience with distributed systems, consistency, or low-latency data pipelines
Recent work is focused on web/AI tooling, not navigation data systems or embedded Linux services
